stemHtml: The first-officer and the flight attendant disagree with a PIC decision. What is correct?

options.a: The PIC has the last word as to the disposition of the aircraft.
options.b: The PIC must respect the position of the first-officer.
options.c: The PIC, first-officer and flight attendant must seek consensus.
options.d: The decision must be made by the first-officer and the flight attendant because they are a majority.
